title: Spotted on Instagram | #amytangerine
excerpt: Layouts, daybooks (have you joined the Facebook group Daybook Delights ?), stamps, embroidery done with our stencil kits, and all kinds of goodies appear using the hashtag #amytangerine on Instagram. We absolutely love seeing what you're sharing. As always, you…
body: Layouts, daybooks (have you joined the Facebook group Daybook Delights?), stamps, embroidery done with our stencil kits, and all kinds of goodies appear using the hashtag #amytangerine on Instagram. We absolutely love seeing what you're sharing. As always, you can follow my adventures on Instagram. You can shop for the latest products online at Two Peas In A Bucket and Simon Says Stamp!
